name: simple-hono-app
summary: A minimal Hono-based web service on Node.js exposing a greeting endpoint, a health check, user lookup, and an in-memory CRUD for kenguroos.

modules.name: greeting
modules.summary: Root greeting capability that returns a welcome message.

modules.name: kenguroos
modules.summary: In-memory CRUD capability for kenguroos (a domain entity with id, name, and age), including list, get, create, update, and delete with input validation. Data is not persisted across restarts.

modules.name: users
modules.summary: User identity lookup capability returning a user representation by id.

modules.name: infrastructure
modules.summary: Cross-cutting technical plumbing: HTTP server bootstrapping, port configuration, route wiring, TypeScript tooling, and dependency management.
